mapper.select: SELECT id, account_code, account_name, account_type, account_subtype, is_debit_normal, parent_account_id, is_active, display_order, created_at, updated_at FROM chart_of_accounts WHERE is_active = true ORDER BY display_order, account_code

SELECT id, account_code, account_name, account_type, account_subtype, is_debit_normal, parent_account_id, is_active, display_order, created_at, updated_at FROM chart_of_accounts WHERE account_code = #{accountCode} AND is_active = true
SELECT id, account_code, account_name, account_type, account_subtype, is_debit_normal, parent_account_id, is_active, display_order, created_at, updated_at FROM chart_of_accounts WHERE id = #{id}

SELECT id, account_code, account_name, account_type, account_subtype, is_debit_normal, parent_account_id, is_active, display_order, created_at, updated_at FROM chart_of_accounts WHERE account_type = #{accountType} AND is_active = true ORDER BY display_order, account_code

SELECT id, account_code, account_name, account_type, account_subtype, is_debit_normal, parent_account_id, is_active, display_order, created_at, updated_at FROM chart_of_accounts WHERE parent_account_id = #{parentAccountId} AND is_active = true ORDER BY display_order, account_code
mapper.update: UPDATE chart_of_accounts SET account_name = #{accountName}, account_type = #{accountType}::account_type_enum, account_subtype = #{accountSubtype}, is_debit_normal = #{isDebitNormal}, parent_account_id = #{parentAccountId}, is_active = #{isActive}, display_order = #{displayOrder}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE chart_of_accounts SET is_active = false, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE chart_of_accounts SET is_active = true, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE chart_of_accounts SET display_order = #{newOrder}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{accountId}
mapper.select: SELECT account_type, COUNT(*) as count, COUNT(CASE WHEN is_active THEN 1 END) as active_count, COUNT(CASE WHEN NOT is_active THEN 1 END) as inactive_count FROM chart_of_accounts GROUP BY account_type ORDER BY account_type

SELECT coa.account_code, coa.account_name, coa.account_type, COUNT(jed.id) as usage_count, COALESCE(SUM(jed.debit_amount), 0) as total_debit, COALESCE(SUM(jed.credit_amount), 0) as total_credit FROM chart_of_accounts coa LEFT JOIN journal_entry_details jed ON coa.account_code = jed.account_code LEFT JOIN journal_entries je ON jed.journal_entry_id = je.id WHERE coa.is_active = true
AND (je.entry_date IS NULL OR je.entry_date >= #{startDate})
AND (je.entry_date IS NULL OR je.entry_date <= #{endDate})
GROUP BY coa.account_code, coa.account_name, coa.account_type ORDER BY usage_count DESC, coa.account_code

SELECT coa.id, coa.account_code, coa.account_name, coa.account_type, coa.account_subtype, coa.is_debit_normal, coa.parent_account_id, coa.is_active, coa.display_order, coa.created_at, coa.updated_at FROM chart_of_accounts coa LEFT JOIN journal_entry_details jed ON coa.account_code = jed.account_code WHERE coa.is_active = true AND jed.id IS NULL ORDER BY coa.account_type, coa.account_code
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO chart_of_accounts ( account_code, account_name, account_type, account_subtype, is_debit_normal, parent_account_id, is_active, display_order ) VALUES
(#{account.accountCode}, #{account.accountName}, #{account.accountType}::account_type_enum, #{account.accountSubtype}, #{account.isDebitNormal}, #{account.parentAccountId}, #{account.isActive}, #{account.displayOrder})
